title: thermistor
description: Thermistor (NTC / PTC) component data — temperature-dependent resistors used for inrush current limiting, temperature sensing/compensation and overtemperature protection. Scope covers ceramic NTC and PTC THERMISTORS only; resettable polymer PTC fuses (PPTC / 'polyfuse') are protection parts and are out of RAS scope. The presence of the 'thermistor' field at the top level of an RAS document discriminates the device type — there is no deviceType property.

technology.title: thermistorTechnology
technology.description: Thermistor technology. 'ntc' — negative temperature coefficient (temperature sensing/compensation, inrush current limiting). 'ptc' — positive temperature coefficient ceramic thermistor (overtemperature sensing, self-regulating heating); NOT a resettable polymer PTC fuse.

datasheetInfo.title: thermistorDatasheetInfo
datasheetInfo.description: All information extracted from the thermistor datasheet.

electrical.title: thermistorElectrical
electrical.description: Thermistor electrical characteristics. Field surface matches the live distributor parametric columns (resistance @ 25 °C, B value, steady-state current, energy) plus the physics constants (dissipation constant, thermal time constant) every NTC/PTC datasheet publishes.

resistanceAt25C.description: Zero-power resistance R25 at 25 °C, in Ohm.

resistanceTolerance.description: Tolerance on resistanceAt25C as a fraction (0.05 = ±5%).

bConstant.description: NTC B (beta) constant between the two reference temperatures given in bConstantTemperatures, in K. NTC parts only — PTC thermistors publish no B constant.

bConstantTemperatures.description: The two reference temperatures that qualify bConstant, in Celsius, ascending (e.g. B25/85 → [25, 85]; B25/100 → [25, 100]).

maximumSteadyStateCurrent.description: Maximum continuous (steady-state) current, in A — the headline rating of NTC inrush current limiters.

maximumEnergy.description: Maximum energy the thermistor can absorb during a single inrush event (capacitive load rating), in J.

dissipationConstant.description: Dissipation constant δth (power needed to raise the body 1 K above ambient in still air), in W/K.

thermalTimeConstant.description: Thermal (cooling) time constant τc — time to cover 63.2% of the temperature step after power removal, in s.

switchTemperature.description: PTC switch / reference temperature T_ref at which the resistance begins its steep rise, in Celsius. PTC parts only.

anyOf.$comment: Empty pre-sourcing seed: an abstract thermistor slot before librarian binding (family-wide seed convention).
